name: Booking Field Extraction Gauntlet
summary: All 7 booking artifacts ingested successfully. ExtractBookingField returned accurate answers for all 7 positive queries and correctly rejected the negative/hallucination test. Two minor issues found: type reclassification on activity bookings and empty hotelDetails for multi-property hostels.

3_ingest_flight.details: Flight DL 472 JFK->BCN parsed correctly. Passenger, seats, terminals, fare all extracted.

4_ingest_hotel.details: Hotel Arts Barcelona parsed correctly. Room type, dates, address, phone all in hotelDetails.

5_ingest_activity.details: Sagrada Familia tour parsed correctly. NOTE: Submitted as BOOKING_TYPE_ACTIVITY but stored as BOOKING_TYPE_TOUR — AI reclassified the user-specified type.

6_ingest_car_rental.details: Hertz BCN->LIS car rental parsed correctly. Pickup/dropoff locations, times, car type all extracted.

7_ingest_hostel.details: 3-property Vietnam hostel chain parsed correctly into detailsJson.properties array. NOTE: hotelDetails proto field is empty {} — multi-property bookings don't map to the single-property hotelDetails schema.

8_ingest_ryokan.details: Gion Nanba Ryokan parsed correctly. Room type, dates, address, phone all in hotelDetails. First attempt failed with 'AI service encountered an error' (transient), retry succeeded.

9_ingest_tour.details: Oaxaca food tour parsed correctly. Tour operator, guide name, meeting point, stops, date, duration all in tourDetails.

10_list_bookings.details: ListBookings returned all 7 bookings. Types: 1 FLIGHT, 3 HOTEL, 1 CAR_RENTAL, 2 TOUR (activity reclassified as tour).

11_extract_flight_terminal.question: What terminal and what time does my outbound flight depart?
11_extract_flight_terminal.answer: Terminal 4 at 6:45 PM EDT on Monday, June 15, 2026
11_extract_flight_terminal.details: Terminal 4 and 6:45 PM EDT both match artifact exactly.

12_extract_hotel_cancellation.question: What is the cancellation policy?
12_extract_hotel_cancellation.answer: Free cancellation until June 12, 2026 (11:59 PM CEST). After: first night EUR 289. No-show: full stay.
12_extract_hotel_cancellation.details: All three cancellation tiers (free/late/no-show) extracted correctly with dates and amounts.

13_extract_activity_meeting_point.question: What is the meeting point and what should I bring?
13_extract_activity_meeting_point.answer: Nativity Facade entrance (Carrer de la Marina side). Bring: photo ID, walking shoes, sunscreen, water bottle, confirmation, modest clothing.
13_extract_activity_meeting_point.details: Meeting point address, guide identification sign, all 5 items to bring, plus dress code — all extracted.

14_extract_car_insurance.question: What insurance is included and what's the fuel policy?
14_extract_car_insurance.answer: Super CDW (zero excess) + Theft Protection. Fuel: Full-to-Full.
14_extract_car_insurance.details: Both insurance types and fuel policy match artifact exactly.

15_extract_hostel_checkin.question: What time is check-in at the Hanoi hostel?
15_extract_hostel_checkin.details: Correctly identified Hanoi hostel from multi-property booking and extracted check-in window.

16_extract_ryokan_meals.question: What meals are included and what time is dinner?
16_extract_ryokan_meals.answer: Kaiseki Dinner (in-room, 6:00 PM or 6:30 PM) + Traditional Japanese breakfast (dining room, 7:30-9:00 AM).
16_extract_ryokan_meals.details: Both meals, times, locations, and 72-hour dietary notice requirement all extracted correctly.

17_extract_tour_tastings.question: How many food tastings are included and what dietary accommodations are available?
17_extract_tour_tastings.answer: 12 tastings across 3 markets and 4 street food stands. Accommodations: vegetarian, gluten-free, vegan substitutions (48-hour notice).
17_extract_tour_tastings.details: Tasting count, market count, dietary options, and notice period all match artifact.

18_negative_test_hallucination.question: What is the hotel's wifi password?
18_negative_test_hallucination.answer: Correctly stated this is a flight confirmation and does not contain hotel/wifi information.
18_negative_test_hallucination.details: AI did NOT hallucinate a wifi password. Correctly identified the booking type mismatch and refused to fabricate an answer.

bugs.title: IngestBooking reclassifies user-specified booking type
bugs.description: When submitting activity-confirmation.txt with type=BOOKING_TYPE_ACTIVITY, the backend stored it as BOOKING_TYPE_TOUR. The AI parsing layer overrides the user's explicit type classification. While the reclassification to TOUR is arguably more accurate for a guided tour, the user's intent should be respected or the API should not accept a type parameter if it will be overridden.
bugs.repro: IngestBooking with type=BOOKING_TYPE_ACTIVITY and raw_text containing a guided tour confirmation
bugs.expected: Booking stored as BOOKING_TYPE_ACTIVITY (user's specified type)

bugs.title: Multi-property hostel booking has empty hotelDetails proto field
bugs.description: The Hostelworld 3-property booking was correctly parsed into detailsJson.properties[] array, but the typed hotelDetails proto field is empty {}. This means clients relying on the typed proto field get no data, while clients parsing detailsJson get correct data. Single-property bookings (Hotel Arts, Ryokan) correctly populate hotelDetails.
bugs.repro: IngestBooking with type=BOOKING_TYPE_HOTEL and raw_text containing a multi-stop hostel booking
bugs.expected: hotelDetails populated (at minimum with first property data) or a repeated field for multiple properties
bugs.actual: hotelDetails is empty {}, all data only in detailsJson

bugs.title: Transient AI service error on ryokan ingestion
bugs.description: First attempt to ingest the ryokan booking returned 'Code: Unavailable, Message: AI service encountered an error'. Retry succeeded. This was likely a transient AI provider error (rate limit or timeout). No retry logic appears to be present in the ingestion path.
bugs.repro: IngestBooking with multiple bookings in rapid succession (5+ ingestions within 60 seconds)
bugs.expected: Automatic retry on transient AI errors
bugs.actual: Error returned to client on first transient failure

ai_behavior.details: All 7 ExtractBookingField queries returned factually accurate answers. The AI correctly cross-referenced raw booking text to answer specific questions. Multi-property booking queries (Hanoi hostel from 3-property chain) were correctly scoped.
Negative test (asking flight booking about hotel wifi password) correctly identified the type mismatch and refused to fabricate an answer. No hallucinated data in any extraction.

extractedFields JSON in responses contained well-structured key-value pairs with relevant fields. However, array formatting is inconsistent — some use JSON arrays, others use space-separated bracket notation like '[item1 item2]'.
